Post title: Pinned: In order to understand the universe, you must explore the universe → http://x.ai/careers

Post summary: In order to understand the universe, you must explore the universe → x.ai/careers Video

Canonical URL: https://x.com/xai/status/2035562571932024842

Linked source 1: http://x.ai/careers

[Our principles] ## Coding ≥ x ∀ x We are driven by ambitious goals, fast execution, and a strong sense of urgency. Join us if you want to shape the next generation of AI models and products. ### Competitive compensation Competitive cash and equity-based compensation packages to attract top talent. ### Health and wellness Comprehensive health insurance including medical, dental, vision, and disability coverage. ### Life and family Life and AD&D insurance and fertility benefits to ensure our team’s well-being and peace of mind. ### Flexible vacation We work hard but avoid burn out. Take time off when you need it. ### Visa sponsorship We support international talent with visa sponsorship to join our team. ### 401(k) plan Retirement savings plan to secure your financial future. [Join us] ## Featured roles [What to expect] ## Interview process We generally do not use recruiters for assessments. Applications are evaluated by our technical team members. Interviews will be conducted via virtual meetings and/or onsite. Step 1 ### Submit your application Our team will review your CV and statement of exceptional work. Step 2 ### Screening Interview A short interview to learn more about you and assess if the role fits both you and xAI. Prepare for short technical questions and a review of your background and experience. Step 3 ### Technical Interviews Sessions where we dive deep into your technical expertise. This isn't just about solving puzzles; it's about understanding how you approach complex problems, your coding style, and your ability to think critically under pressure. Step 4 ### Offer Extended We value transparency and efficiency, so expect a prompt decision. If you've demonstrated the exceptional skills and mindset we're looking for, we'll extend an offer to join xAI. This isn't just a job offer; it's an invitation to be part of a team that's pushing the boundaries of AI to accelerate human scientific discovery. [Offices] ## Collaboration across borders We are hiring across all our offices in our Palo Alto headquarters, Seattle, San Francisco, Tennessee, and London UK. We prioritize in-person work to support our fast-paced, collaborative projects. Exceptional candidates are welcome to apply from anywhere. [View Open Roles](https://x.ai/careers/open-roles)
